Pitch Perfect 2 (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $184,296,230Details
International Box Office $102,918,966
Worldwide Box Office $287,215,196
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $23,812,444
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $19,409,757
Total $43,222,201
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world in Pitch Perfect 2. It’s been three years since the Bellas brought their signature vocals, style and attitude to become the first all-female group to win a national title. But when they get banned after a scandal that threatens to derail their last year at Barden, the three-time defending champs worry that this time they’ve lost their harmony for good.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$69,216,890 (37.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.66 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:64.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$29,000,000 (worldwide box office is 9.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,473 opening theaters/3,660 max. theaters, 5.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $261,468,910

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 15th, 2015 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: May 7th, 2015 (Wide) (Australia)
May 7th, 2015 (Wide) (New Zealand)
May 13th, 2015 (Wide) (Philippines)
May 14th, 2015 (Wide) (Singapore)
May 14th, 2015 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
Video Release: September 1st, 2015 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for innuendo and language.
(Rating bulletin 2354, 12/24/2014)
Running Time: 115 minutes
Franchise: Pitch Perfect

Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Gold Circle Films, Brownstone
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world in Pitch Perfect 2. It’s been three years since the Bellas brought their signature vocals, style and attitude to become the first all-female group to win a national title. But when they get banned after a scandal that threatens to derail their last year at Barden, the three-time defending champs worry that this time they’ve lost their harmony for good.

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.
